{{Quote|I can translate over four million forms of communication and retain knowledge concerning this Star Destroyer that you might find useful.|T-3PO|<ref name="SF" />}}
'''T-3PO''' was a silver [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] with insectile plating and a [[Gender/Legends|feminine]] personality who served aboard the [[Subjugator (Victory-class)|''Subjugator'']]. T-3PO was a harsh droid with feminine programming, and her many [[Standard year/Legends|years]] servitude to her masters onboard the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] made her hate them. Her programming restricted her from expressing this hate towards them. When the ''Subjugator'' was [[Attack on the Subjugator|attacked]] by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Task Force Starfall|fleet]], T-3PO was assured that she would survive the encounter, because her programming told she was superior to the other droids on the ship. As other droids deserted their posts in sheer confusion, T-3PO realized she had to follow [[Walex Blissex/Legends|Walex Blissex]], and his Rebel Alliance agents accompanying him.
